programmes.show_description: Heart-pounding thriller with Mel Gibson. A veteran bomb squad officer races against time - and a ticking explosive device - to save an IT technician taken hostage by a terrorist mastermind.
Crime thriller with Geoff Bell. A gang of crooks plan to steal millions of pounds from a London exchange bank, but things go horribly wrong and the thieves are forced to take hostages.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A married couple and their four children are accused of trashing a family member's house after an eight-year rental.
A woman sues her business partner for the value of her pants inventory; her partner says she did all the work.
A woman sues her stepdaughter for the return of her Pomeranian puppy because she fears the animal is being abused.
A man accuses his Ex girlfriend of purposefully breaking his TV during an argument; she says she was mad that he ate fast food that allegedly upsets his stomach.
A popular social media personality invests in a candy company, but the minute he begins promotions, his business partner allegedly goes missing.
In a child custody tug-of-war, a woman ignores the father of her child's rights and tries to take their teen son.
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases.

A young man denies 'mooning' his girlfriend's aunt and throwing rocks at her car after a dispute over a loan; they claim the money was a gift.

Sarah Ludemann and Rachel Wade are dating the same boy. Instead of being mad at him, they take out their revenge on each other, leaving Sarah stabbed to death in the street.
When Jennifer Pan calls police about a home invasion killing her parents, investigators think she's innocent. That is, until her story doesn't add up and proves she is the killer.
A daughter hears her father's last words - can she help convict his killer? Erin Moriarty investigates.
When a nurse discovers that she's HIV-positive, science was able to determine not only how she had been infected, but also by whom. The worst part: It wasn't an accident.
Time of death becomes pivotal after a woman was found murdered in her air-conditioned room. Similarities between her death and a movie give examiners the clues to find the killer.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Alex is grievously wounded at Kim and Phil's wedding...
Brutal crime thriller starring Gerard Butler. A man takes justice into his own hands and begins a campaign of vigilante violence after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free.
Tense thriller with Josh Hartnett. An unfortunate case of mistaken identity leaves an ordinary man with the task of paying off a debt to an underworld kingpin by assassinating a rival mobster.
Revenge-fuelled action with Antonio Banderas. After his wife and daughter are murdered, a lawyer takes a vow of silence and uses martial arts training to transform his body and avenge them.
Classic horror starring Vincent Price. A young soldier tries to end the cruel acts of Matthew Hopkins - the self-appointed 'Witchfinder General' - during the English Civil War.

When a frightened 6-year-old claims to have spotted a snake in his home, he and his mother move out and sue for damages.
A young woman moves in with her employer whom she later accuses of vandalizing her car; her employer says she stole from her family.
After meeting in a homeless shelter, ex-roommates fight over alleged vandalism and highly suspicious CPS reports.
Parents of two children fight over alleged vehicle vandalism, bleached clothes and a car crash.

While a woman is watching TV, her Husky allegedly escapes the home, enters a neighbour's house and mauls his kitten.

A mass shooting on the University of Alabama campus leaves the country in shock. The investigation leads to a bitter professor who wanted revenge.
Real estate tycoon Gary Triano is dead after his car explodes. His ex-wife, Pamela Phillips, is to blame when police discover her plot to receive his life insurance policy.
Two doctors and a plot to kill - the man who posed as a hired hit man speaks out for the first time to correspondent Peter Van Sant.
A union official is executed in his home not long after a strike by the union membership. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighbourhood heard any gunshots.
A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. Four years later, new forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this 'hero'.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Walker helps free a man falsely accused of a crime, but then things take an ugly turn...
Thriller remake with Robert De Niro. A psychopathic rapist is released from prison after 14 years and plots revenge on the defence attorney he blames for his imprisonment.
Crime drama with Stephen Dorff. A crooked cop trying to redeem himself finds his shady past coming back to haunt him when the man who saved his life needs a favour.
